description:
Turbo speed image generation with strengths in prompt following, visual quality, image detail and output diversity. This is the fastest version of FLUX.1. 

Optional parameters:
Set aspect ratio. Valid aspect ratios are 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16. 

Note: Send an image to have this model reimagine/regenerate it via FLUX Redux.
